description: Trial-and-error instead of reading code to understand it first
Making changes without verifying them (no check/test run after edits)
Fixing symptoms instead of root causes
Changing more files than necessary to solve the problem
Copy-pasting code instead of extracting shared logic
Leaving debug artifacts (console.log, commented-out code, temporary files)
Making an edit then immediately making another edit to the same file to fix the first edit
Not reading a file before editing it
Running a command, getting an error, and running the same command again expecting different results
Solving a different problem than the one that was asked about
Did not create a plan before starting work
